query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.hasRegistered,
       COUNT(ch.id) as cycleCount,
       SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) as totalPuzzles,
       SUM(ch.correctCount) as correctCount
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON u.id = ch.userId
WHERE u.hasRegistered = 1
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.hasRegistered
ORDER BY totalPuzzles DESC
LIMIT 20;
